data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has minted 250 million USDC. This development is part of the ongoing activities within the cryptocurrency market, reflecting the dynamics of stablecoin issuance and its potential impact on market liquidity.

data.title: Greeks.live: Tomorrow will see the largest options settlement in Q1, with nearly 40% of options expiring.
data.description: Greeks.live posted on the X platform that tomorrow will see the largest options settlement of the first quarter of this year, with nearly 40% of options expiring. 1. Key Settlement Data: BTC's Max Pain: Currently pegged to $75,000, this seems unlikely given the current situation. Put/C Ratio: Remaining around 0.6, relatively low, indicating low trading volume for put options, but overall sentiment remains bearish. 2. Volatility (IV) Warning: An IV Crush is imminent. Currently, front-end implied volatility nearing expiration remains strong. However, after tomorrow's settlement, a sharp IV Crush (volatility plunge) is highly probable. Buyers of short-term options are at a significant disadvantage (severe Theta loss), while sellers have a clear advantage. 3. Whales and Block Trades: Today's block trade data on Deribit shows that smart money is aggressively rolling over options. Many institutions closed out their positions expiring tomorrow and built up large positions in June and September out-of-the-money call options (OTM Calls).

data.title: X lost its lawsuit accusing advertisers of boycotting the platform.
data.description: According to market sources, Elon Musk's X platform lost a lawsuit alleging a boycott by advertisers. (Jinshi)

data.title: Euro-Denominated Stablecoins Dominate Non-U.S. Dollar Market
data.description: Euro-denominated stablecoins account for over 80% of the non-U.S. dollar stablecoin market, according to NS3.AI. This segment is valued at approximately $1.2 billion. Over the past three years, the monthly trading volume for non-dollar stablecoins has increased to about $10 billion.

data.title: Musk's X Platform Loses Lawsuit Over Advertiser Boycott Allegations
data.description: Market reports indicate that Elon Musk's X platform has lost a lawsuit concerning allegations of an advertiser boycott. According to Odaily, the legal proceedings were centered around claims that advertisers were intentionally avoiding the platform. The outcome marks a significant development in the ongoing challenges faced by the platform in maintaining its advertising partnerships.

data.title: Resolv Labs Warns Against Trading USR Stablecoin Amid Security Concerns
data.description:
Resolv Labs has issued a strong advisory against trading or purchasing the USR stablecoin. According to ChainCatcher, on-chain data reveals that USR coins, illegally minted by attackers, have been mixed with legitimate USR in various wallets and continue to circulate in secondary markets. The company highlighted that these illicitly minted USR coins lack collateral support and redemption rights, making any transactions potentially involve tainted assets, complicating future asset recovery and management.

Resolv Labs stated that they are in the early stages of evaluating compensation plans for affected users and cannot make any guarantees at this time. They warned that ongoing trading activities might further limit potential compensation options. The team is working closely with relevant protocol partners to develop a solution and plans to release more details in the future.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Announces New Federal Reserve Candidate
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that a highly qualified candidate is set to take over at the Federal Reserve. According to Jin10, this announcement comes as the administration seeks to ensure stability and effective monetary policy management. The identity of the candidate has not been disclosed, but the selection is expected to align with the administration's economic objectives. The Federal Reserve plays a crucial role in shaping the U.S. economy, and the new appointment is anticipated to influence future monetary policies.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Criticizes Fed Chair Powell's Performance
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed strong disapproval of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's handling of monetary policy. According to Jin10, Trump described Powell's performance as 'terrible,' reflecting ongoing tensions between the White House and the Federal Reserve. The criticism comes amid debates over interest rates and economic strategies, highlighting the President's dissatisfaction with the central bank's approach. Trump's remarks add to the pressure on Powell, who has been navigating complex economic challenges.

data.title: Stryker Resumes Operations After Cyberattack Disruption
data.description:
Stryker, a leading medical technology company, has successfully restarted its electronic ordering system and most of its manufacturing operations following a cyberattack earlier this month. Bloomberg posted on X that the company had been working diligently to restore its systems and ensure the continuity of its operations.

The cyberattack had temporarily disrupted Stryker's ability to process electronic orders and affected its manufacturing capabilities. The company has since implemented enhanced security measures to prevent future incidents and safeguard its operations.

Stryker's swift response and recovery efforts highlight the importance of cybersecurity in the medical technology sector, where operational disruptions can have significant implications for healthcare providers and patients. The company remains committed to maintaining the integrity and security of its systems as it continues to serve its global customer base.

data.title: Stablecoins Transition to Settlement Infrastructure Following GENIUS Act
data.description: Stablecoins are evolving from mere crypto trading tools to becoming integral components of settlement infrastructure for tokenized markets and cross-border payments. According to NS3.AI, this shift is largely driven by the GENIUS Act, which has established a federal framework for payment stablecoins. The newsletter also features expert commentary on the credibility of stablecoins and the associated policy risks. Additionally, brief updates are provided on the Clarity Act, developments at the New York Stock Exchange, and Monument.

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth: Pentagon to Continue 'Negotiations with Bombs'
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has stated that the Department of Defense will persist in using military force as a bargaining tool in international negotiations. According to Jin10, Hegseth emphasized the strategic importance of maintaining a strong defense posture to ensure national security and influence global diplomatic outcomes. He reiterated the Pentagon's commitment to leveraging its military capabilities in discussions with foreign entities, highlighting the role of defense in shaping geopolitical landscapes. Hegseth's remarks underscore the ongoing emphasis on military strength as a key component of U.S. foreign policy.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 69,000 USDT with a 2.63% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 26, 2026, 15:15 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 69,000 USDT and is now trading at 68,981.820313 USDT, with a narrowed 2.63% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Trump: Energy prices will fall, possibly even lower.
data.description: US President Trump stated that energy prices will fall, and may even go lower. Bessant will speak on measures to address rising energy prices, and the US has multiple options regarding Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Secretary of State Rubio: Trump's Mission Will Lead to a Safer World
data.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has expressed confidence in President Donald Trump's leadership, stating that once Trump's mission is accomplished, the world will become a safer and better place. According to Jin10, Rubio emphasized the positive impact of Trump's policies on global security and prosperity. He highlighted the administration's efforts in strengthening international alliances and promoting peace through diplomatic channels. Rubio's remarks underscore the administration's commitment to achieving long-term global stability and enhancing international cooperation.

data.title: Kansas Fed Manufacturing Index Rises in March
data.description: The Kansas Federal Reserve's manufacturing composite index increased to 11 in March, up from a previous reading of 5. According to Jin10, this rise indicates an improvement in manufacturing activity within the region. The index measures the health of the manufacturing sector, with positive values suggesting expansion. This development may reflect broader economic trends and could influence future monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Clear Benefits from Increased Airport Wait Times
data.description: Record-breaking wait times at airports are causing frustration for travelers and disrupting vacation plans nationwide. Bloomberg posted on X, analysts have noted that this situation has proven advantageous for security firm Clear. The company, which provides expedited security screening services, is seeing increased demand as travelers seek to avoid long lines. This surge in demand highlights the growing reliance on services that offer convenience and efficiency in the face of travel disruptions.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: 98% Reduction in Drug Trafficking via Sea Routes
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced a significant decrease in drug trafficking through sea routes, claiming a 98% reduction. According to Jin10, this statement highlights the administration's efforts to combat illegal drug trade and enhance border security. The President emphasized the importance of continued vigilance and cooperation with international partners to maintain this progress. The reduction is seen as a major achievement in the ongoing fight against drug smuggling, contributing to safer communities and improved public health outcomes.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: Strait to Reopen if Iran Reaches Proper Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the strait will be reopened if Iran reaches a proper agreement. According to Jin10, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions in the region. The reopening of the strait is contingent upon Iran agreeing to terms that are deemed acceptable by the United States. This development is part of broader diplomatic efforts to address regional security concerns and ensure the safe passage of vessels through the strategic waterway. The situation remains fluid as negotiations continue.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from NYDIG Custody to Multiple Addresses
data.description: A significant transfer of Bitcoin has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, at 22:31, a total of 435.88 BTC was moved from NYDIG Custody to several addresses, including an anonymous one starting with 1CiRR2.

data.title: Trump: I thought the US stock market would fall even more; oil prices and the stock market have never fallen so "severely".
data.description: US President Trump, speaking about the US stock market, said he expected it to fall even more sharply. He stated that oil prices and the stock market had never fallen so "severely," and that the Iran issue would soon be resolved, not long after. (Jinshi)
